# ozDNA

> ozDNA (Findbelow Ventures) builds verifiability software. Two products: **ComplyDNA**,
> a compliance LLM for Turkish financial regulation that answers with inline statutory
> citations; and **OriginDNA**, content provenance infrastructure for EU AI Act
> Article 50 content marking (pre-launch, waitlist open).

## ComplyDNA — https://ozdna.com/products/comply/

> ComplyDNA, Türk mevzuatına (MASAK tebliğleri, AML/CFT kanunları 5549 ve 6415, KVKK) özel
> eğitilmiş bir uyum LLM'idir. Her yanıtını [TEBLİĞ / Madde] biçiminde satır içi kaynak
> künyesiyle verir; yanıtın dayandığı mevzuat parçası cümle düzeyinde doğrulanabilir.

- Kapsam: 5549, 6415, KVKK (6698), MASAK tebliğ/genelgeleri, Tedbirler Yönetmeliği, kripto varlık (VASP/CASP) düzenlemeleri
- Cite-first: her iddia mevzuat kaynağına bağlanır; müşteri verisi eğitime karışmaz
- Dağıtım: bulut API / web arayüzü veya tam kurum içi (on-prem)
- Planlar: Pilot (POC), Team (yıllık abonelik), Enterprise/On-prem (yıllık lisans)
- Çıktılar bilgilendirme amaçlıdır, hukuki tavsiye değildir

## OriginDNA — https://ozdna.com/products/origin/

> OriginDNA is content provenance infrastructure: every image gets a cryptographic
> signature at creation (open C2PA standard), a timestamp anchored in a public,
> independently verifiable record, and a perceptual fingerprint that survives metadata
> stripping. Built for EU AI Act Article 50 content marking (applies Aug 2, 2026; grace
> for existing GenAI systems ends Dec 2, 2026).

- Status: pre-launch; MVP October 2026; segmented waitlist open at /products/origin/#waitlist
- v1 scope: images (JPG/PNG); provenance, not AI detection; no token; no user funds held
- Segments: GenAI apps (API, from $49/mo at launch), sellers/creators (badge), newsrooms & fact-checkers (free forever), legal/enterprise (later)
- Not yet a certified C2PA-conformance member; verification runs via OriginDNA's own public verify page

## Knowledge bundle (read these instead of scraping)

- https://ozdna.com/knowledge/_index.md
- https://ozdna.com/llms-full.txt (full bundle, single file)
